Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Paul Arnold is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of OCT-31-2011 is vacated.
